history.thought: The first step in any penetration test is to discover open ports and services. Nmap is the perfect tool for this. I'll start with a comprehensive scan to identify common ports and services, including version detection and OS detection.

The initial Nmap scan showed all 1000 common ports closed. This could be due to a firewall or no services running. To be absolutely sure, I will perform a full port scan (1-65535) to check for any less common open ports that might have been missed by the default scan.
